final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] reg_out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable)
            reg_out <= data_in;
    end
    
endmodule
